metadata.title:
FIND PLATINUM
ON THE ST. JOE

pages.raw_text:
within but a short distance of Spo-
kane. From all indications there is
lots of the platinum.


This metal is very rare and is being
more extensively used and consequent
ly becoming more valuable with time.


In speaking of the new excitement
and his trip to the scene, Mr.. Dowd
said:


1.-The territory lies about eight miles
south of the Wardner belt and the
indications now show great deposits OF
copper. gold and silver. and it is my
opinion that the rich silver-lead ores
of the Occur d'Alene district run
through the section, and that eventu-
ally the leads now located will open
up into lead and silver in great guam
titles


1.-The veins are true assures and well
defined leads; the formation is all that
could be desired. Granite. slate and
porphyry and the bodies as nearly as
can be Judged by the surface show
ings are very extensive.


ASSAY returns from the rock taken
on the properties go from $40 to $50
per ton.
